subcodes.first_line: O Father of virtues and mine of goodly qualities! For some time no word or tidings or greeting hath been received from thy noble presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابی الفضائل و معدن حسن الخصائل مدتیست از آنحضرت نه خبری نه سلامی و نه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @firmness in the Covenant, @review of publications, @love of God
